description.en: Build the People & Talent frontend on top of the course REST API: candidate list and detail with Next.js App Router, filters and search via query params, CRUD notes, register and edit candidates, async UI states, and TypeScript types — aligned with CONTEXT-company.md.
description.es: Construye el frontend de People & Talent sobre la API REST del curso: listado y detalle de candidatos con Next.js App Router, filtros y búsqueda con query params, notas CRUD, alta y edición de candidatos, estados asíncronos en la UI y tipos TypeScript — alineado con CONTEXT-company.md.

sharing.en: I just completed Milestone 3 — Talent Pipeline Tracker with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-milestone-talent-pipeline-tracker #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #react #typescript
